proposals.trend_ja: 確率帯 55-59%は検証46件でROI-21.5%と偏りが出ています
proposals.trend_en: Prob band 55-59%: ROI -21.5% over 46 settled picks
proposals.suggest_ja: この区分の表示格下げ(参考扱い)や、ブレンド重み(WEIGHT_MARKET/WEIGHT_AI/WEIGHT_STAT)の見直しを検討。※確率補正層適用済み: 補正後の新規データで改善するか監視
proposals.suggest_en: Consider demoting this segment to reference-only display, or revisiting the blend weights (WEIGHT_MARKET/AI/STAT). Note: the calibration correction layer is already active — monitor whether post-correction picks improve

proposals.trend_en: Prob band 60-64%: ROI +15.7% over 45 settled picks
proposals.suggest_ja: 好調な区分。ただし重み引き上げ等の強化は時期尚早で、まずサンプルを増やして安定性を確認。※確率補正層適用済み: 補正後の新規データで改善するか監視
proposals.suggest_en: Performing well, but boosting weights would be premature — keep accumulating samples to confirm stability. Note: the calibration correction layer is already active — monitor whether post-correction picks improve
